name: John (Ah) Hang (William Hang? Tonk Kee Hang)
source_excerpt: Enlisted: July 24, 1863. U.S.S Albatross and Penguin Final Discharge: Sept. 30, 1864. GAR muster date: 15 Jun, 1920 in New York. Occupation after War: Tobacco Merchant. Residence after war: Soldiers and Sailors Home; No.8 Franklin street, New York City; Had a business at 500 Pearl Street and on Mott Street; Pension Approved: https://www.fold3.com/image/67165789/hang-john-page-117-us-navy-survivors-certificates-1861-1910; William Hang Confusion: Took the name of William at the urging of his first wife; Married Twice: Jennie Busch, 1868 in Savannah Georgia, died at West Brighton Staten Island. Second was to Maggie Duffy in 1878 and she died in April 1887 at West Brighton Staten Island.
